name: Fish Cakes with Horseradish-Sour Cream Sauce
recipeIngredient: flour or cornmeal for rolling cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Pat fillets dry with paper towel.
2. Place fillets in food processor or grinder.
3. Cook and mash potatoes. Set aside and cool.
4. In a bowl, mix together all remaining ingredients except vegetable oil. Add fish and potatoes to mixture, shaping into 2-inch patties.
5. Dust patties with flour or cornmeal.
6. Heat vegetable oil in saute pan until hot.
7. Saute cakes until golden brown on both sides, about three minutes per side (firm but not overcooked).
8. Sauce:
- Mix sour cream and horseradish together.
